text:
Once upon a time in a small forest town, there lived a girl named Willow. She loved everything about her cozy little cottage — the birds singing, the sunlight filtering through the leaves, and her fluffy white bunny. One day, while she was weeding her garden, she heard a voice.

"It's me."

Willow paused. She looked up. A gentle owl was perched on a branch just above her.

"Oh! Hello, Owl. Did you hear me?"

"I thought I did. But wouldn.”

Willow smiled.

"What?”

Just then a squirrel chattered excitedly.

"Talk?" Willow asked, puzzled.

"No, listen. You were saying 'hello'? Like you're talking?"

Willow laughed.

"You mean...like you?"

The owl blinked lazily.

"Oh. I guess you do talk now."

The owl hooted warmly.

And so life went on: Willow talking to owls, squirrels, and even talking owlberries. Life was good again. Then
